metadata.title: Maintenance | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered maintenance management platform for all your equipment operations — from preventive and corrective maintenance to work orders, scheduling, and equipment effectiveness tracking.

hero.title: Plan Maintenance.
hero.description: Manage preventive and corrective maintenance in one place, so issues are handled early and emergencies stay off the schedule.

preventiveSection.title: Automate preventive
preventiveSection.subtitle: maintenance
preventiveSection.text: Use computed statistics, scheduling rules, expected next failure dates, and IoT data to automate metrology and preventive maintenance.

requestsSection.title: Organize your
requestsSection.subtitle: maintenance requests
requestsSection.description: with great kanban and calendar views.
requestsSection.text: Easily track maintenance requests with kanban view. Use the maintenance calendar to organize activities and manage team workload in a clean drag-and-drop interface.

equipmentSection.title: Increase overall equipment
equipmentSection.subtitle: effectiveness.
equipmentSection.text1: Manufacturing teams can trigger maintenance requests directly from work centers. When the team acts, the right people are updated in real time.
equipmentSection.text2: Better communication reduces downtime and makes your manufacturing operation more efficient.

dashboardSection.title: Dashboard & Statistics
dashboardSection.subtitle: to optimize your performance.
dashboardSection.description: Use automatically computed statistics including MTBF and MTBR to fine tune preventive maintenance rules and reduce risk of equipment failure.
dashboardSection.label: New request

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon
